mapper.select: select * from t_r_ai_message where session_id = #{sessionId} order by created_at asc, id asc
mapper.update: update t_r_ai_message set status = #{status}, `content` = #{content}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, model = #{model}, prompt_tokens = #{promptTokens}, completion_tokens = #{completionTokens}, cost_cents = #{costCents}, latency_ms = #{latencyMs} where id = #{id}
